svg.text: Phase 1: combined strike — 4 channels per country

g.text: 🇺🇸 US · 🇬🇧 UK · 🇧🇷 BR · 🇦🇺 AU · 🇸🇬 SG · 🇮🇹 IT · 🇿🇦 ZA · 🇳🇱 NL ✅
8 countries × 4 channels = 32 data pulls → merge into one list per country
Load country config YAML → execution plan
Normalize → universal schema (legal suffixes per country)
Merge + dedup (domain match → name fuzzy → multi-source tag)
Enrich: website HEAD check + Apollo API (Tier A only)
Output: Excel + Supabase upsert + Pipeline cards

svg.text: Infrastructure build: ~16 hrs. Then each new country: ~10 min agent run

g.text: 240 Top 30 per country → BD pipeline ready. Cost: $99/mo
UK CH, BR CNPJ, SG ACRA, JP NTA
What exists vs what needs building
✅ Built: Google Crawler, DJI dealer JSON, Comet browser, Apollo API, Lemlist API,
scoring engine, enrichment agent, pipeline Kanban, campaign hub
❌ Build: Country YAML configs (~2h), aviation scrapers (~8h), normalizer (~3h),
